title: Romantic Yeasty Tunisian Prawns Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful Tagine made with saffron-infused yeast dough, succulent prawns, and a hint of cumin. Perfect for a romantic dinner.
instructions: In a small bowl, combine yeast and warm water. Let it sit for 5 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix together flour, salt, and cumin seeds.
Add the saffron threads to the flour mixture and stir well.
Add the yeast mixture to the flour mixture and knead for 5 minutes until a dough forms.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of ghee or oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until it's translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the prawns and cook until they're pink and cooked through.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch and place it on a baking sheet.
Transfer the skillet with the prawns to the top of the dough and spread the prawns evenly.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
